_note: releaseSha must be set to the exact merge commit SHA after a passing CI run is recorded for that commit. Do not set releaseSha until the CI run for that SHA is complete.

identityProvider.providerClass: Cloudflare Access with external OIDC identity provider

secretManager.providerClass: GitHub Environment secrets for staging; external managed secret manager required for production runtime

managedDataServices.databaseClass: Managed PostgreSQL with encrypted storage and point-in-time recovery

observability.platformClass: Prometheus-compatible metrics, Loki-compatible logs, OpenTelemetry traces
observability.alertRouteClass: GitHub issue plus operator notification channel
